title: Evangelion VR game BD
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion VR game BD             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Thu Jul 13, 2017 3:20 pm Just saw the video for this, I don't know if anyone was previously talking about it: EVANGELION 'Evangelion VR The Soul' s Promotion Movie The Eva movements in battle are pretty muted and clunky, but otherwise, this looks fantastic . The environments are large, Zeriuel is intimidating, and dat chain gun ... ( oh btw, POV is Unit-00, don't let the purple cockpit fool you like it did me. )

[]: Re: Evangelion VR game BD             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Jul 13, 2017 5:22 pm POV starts as Unit-00, but that's definitely Unit-01's POV with the chain gun. Eva needs an AAA game. If we must explore the fourteen year gap, do it in a video game.

Article: Evangelion VR game BD
[]: Evangelion VR game BD             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Thu Jul 13, 2017 3:20 pm Just saw the video for this, I don't know if anyone was previously talking about it: EVANGELION 'Evangelion VR The Soul' s Promotion Movie The Eva movements in battle are pretty muted and clunky, but otherwise, this looks fantastic . The environments are large, Zeriuel is intimidating, and dat chain gun ... ( oh btw, POV is Unit-00, don't let the purple cockpit fool you like it did me. )

[]: Re: Evangelion VR game BD             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Jul 13, 2017 5:22 pm POV starts as Unit-00, but that's definitely Unit-01's POV with the chain gun. Eva needs an AAA game. If we must explore the fourteen year gap, do it in a video game.
